level3_path_follow.text: You follow the path with Antakin, feeling the subtle hum of the cards under your fingers.

level3_path_follow_2.text: Antakin begins to speak, her voice sounding heavier than usual—weighted down by old memories.

antakin_talks_about_valor.mageText: Valor had to sacrifice herself to hold back the corruption. But it wasn't enough.

antakin_talks_about_mordu.mageText: There’s someone you need to know about: Mordu. A shapeshifter who devours the land to grow stronger.

antakin_talks_about_mordu_2.mageText: What he leaves behind is nothing but devastation. Pure silence.

mordu_voice_intro.text: Suddenly, a sharp pang pierces your mind. A cold, oily voice fills your head.

mordu_voice_intro_2.text: Mordu. 'Use the cards for evil,' he whispers. 'This world has nothing left but sadness anyway.'

mordu_voice_intro_3.text: 'Isn’t it curious?' the voice coaxes. 'Imagine the power you could wield...'

mordu_offer_choice.text: Mordu whispers promises: 'I am only a servant. You... you are the one who can claim all of this.'

f1_dont_listen.text: Mordu grumbles angrily, his voice fading like a dying echo.

f1_dont_listen_2.text: A sudden splash of water from Antakin's flask jolts you back to reality.

antakin_wakes_player.mageText: Hah… you alright? You spaced out for a moment there, kid.

f1_player_response.text: You try to explain what you felt...

choices.text: I… I… just talked to someone

antakin_response_what_happened.mageText: Nothing you can’t handle. But you need more practice—with the cards, and with yourself.

antakin_response_talked.mageText: Imaginary or not, you need to sharpen up. Don't let your mind wander into the fog.

antakin_response_common.mageText: Focus up. There's something waiting ahead. Pay attention.

f1_end.text: You take a deep breath. The path ahead remains dark and uncertain, but it's yours to face.

f2_curious.text: Compelled by curiosity, you reach for a card and unleash it immediately.

f2_curious_2.text: Pain sears through your head. Mordu’s voice giggles, promising the agony is only brief.

f2_floating.text: You breathe in, breathe out, and feel your boots leave the ground. You're lifting.

f2_floating_2.text: You hear Antakin shouting instructions, but her voice is miles away. It's too late.

f2_floating_3.text: The sludge of Mordu's presence has entered your system. It feels... warm.

f2_end.text: The darkness pulses inside you. Curiosity has consequences you can never undo.
